trigger.description: A Rust compiler diagnostic (error with --> location) is attributed via OwnershipSnapshot, but no active (non-expired) Agent Mail reservation or Beads assignee matches the diagnostic path after glob normalization.
setup_commands: # provide an OwnershipSnapshot with no matching reservations/beads for the failing path
# or all matching claims are expired
trigger.invocation: ee swarm brief --workspace . --json (or handoff preview/create that includes compile attribution)

expected_emission.repair_string: br list --status in_progress --json; bv --robot-file-beads <path>; search Agent Mail for the source path before editing
